MASTER COURT TRIAL CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2024 - MATTHEW WERTHEIM, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF LEE 1989 FAMILY TRUST DATED 2/20/89. JAMES BURNS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS JEANETTE LAM AND JIM CHIAN LAM. THE COURT IMPOSES SANCTIONS TO ATTORNEY MATTHEW WERTHEIM, ESQ. AND TO ATTORNEY JAMES BURNS, ESQ. IN THE AMOUNT OF $60.00 EACH, FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NO OSC WILL BE SET BY THE COURT. SANCTIONS SHALL BE PAID BY 03/08/24. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. CASE IS PLACED ON TELEPHONE STANDBY. TRIAL TIME ESTIMATE: 2-3 DAYS. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
